states.name: Momotaro
states.title: Peachy Big Sister
states.description: Momo Fujiwara shared the same father as Reina, yet she was born to a woman who was never his wife. Because she was acknowledged by her father, her family name in the registry was Fujiwara, but Momo and her mother were kept at a distance from the main family, living in a detached house on the Fujiwara estate.

states.name: Momotaro
states.title: Peachy Big Sister
states.description: From an early age, Momo was a lively child, full of curiosity. She had a good relationship with her mother, but the rest of her family looked at her coldly. She often saw Reina on the estate grounds and treated her like a little sister, doting on her and playing together. However, Reina was always warned not to play with "that girl."

states.name: Momotaro
states.title: Peachy Big Sister
states.description: The day before Reina was taken to the academy, after it was revealed she was a vessel, Momo discovered that she had been crying. After that, Momo joined the cult led by Elysian, believing that since they proclaimed liberation from Pandora, they might be able to save Reina.
